name: Project Overview
query:
SELECT 
    p.name AS project_id,
    p.project_name,
    p.status,
    p.priority,
    p.start_date,
    p.end_date,
    p.progress AS completion_percentage,
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tm.user) AS assigned_team,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `tabTask` t WHERE t.project = p.name AND t.status != 'Completed') AS pending_tasks,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `tabTask` t WHERE t.project = p.name AND t.status = 'Completed') AS completed_tasks
FROM `tabProject` p
LEFT JOIN `tabTeam Member` tm ON tm.parent = p.name
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY p.start_date DESC;
